capture: Oasis and Purification II live combat, same seed and route
required_signal: GameThread call tree with actor/component class ownership; dumpticks grouped; active AI/skill/component counts
decision: Ranks the exact owner of the ~7.8–8.4 ms live-minus-frozen gap.

capture: A/B CVar: idle-skill tick gating only
required_signal: Active GT, component tick calls/frame, damage/shot/cooldown event equality
decision: Ships only if it saves ≥0.7 ms without simulation drift.

capture: A/B CVar: 72/36/24 Hz AI significance tiers
required_signal: Active GT, ActorTicks, movement/attack latency, path failures and damage
decision: Choose the least aggressive tier meeting the 10.5 ms active-GT target.

capture: A/B CVar: DetectTargets 72 Hz versus 36 Hz cached
required_signal: STAT_DetectTargets median/P99, acquisition latency and wrong-target count
decision: Keep if median ≤0.10 ms and acquisition remains within 27.8 ms.

required_signal: Per-hitch GC, file IO, async load, physics and PSO events
decision: Assign each >50 ms frame to a measured subsystem before remediation.
